title: Rain: A key-value store for Strava’s scale

summary: Much of our heatmaps are built on batch data outputs stored in Rain At Strava, we love maps — some of our most loved features are nestled on map surfaces. summary: Strava challenges offer a fun way for athletes to compete against themselves and others! title: Personal Heatmaps

summary: This post discusses the algorithm behind Personal Heatmap, one of Strava’s most acclaimed subscriber features.
